textByHash.540f390cc4cd12a7277ce1355094ba63f47dcd53: Aaah! What are you doing down here!?
textByHash.b690d7ff4caed58dd0f4b31879c3b61ef63fb949: Oh, that's ok then. These vile creatures do make an awful racket.
textByHash.65bcb8c34228a9b3045eb69e62f3777c418ce94d: I'm Raulyn. Once servant to the great Viggora who built this place centuries ago.
textByHash.3965bd4c7a59222f6f3b301cdb079e3bbb08b088: This was, of course, before the building started to sink into the swamp...
textByHash.2694177f447e0b66ad86b5dd403409c31694f42e: Oh, and the darn Zamorakian mages. They didn't help matters. Always making a mess.
textByHash.2094c9dcc4ef74dc39cd9d5ba75f6ce9aa98822e: I've been here ever since. You're the first person I've spoken to in over 200 years.
textByHash.5cb32a0844a9f78a13529068da4389f64a26a6d1: Sometimes, but it's not all that bad. I hope you stop by more often!
textByHash.c4c6902001fc20b9a9455f0ab798e20be40752ea: I don't think that's what you're meant to be slaying.
